ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the inspector */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency where the inspector works */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the inspector */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Unique badge number assigned to the inspector */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the inspector was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violators" (
  "violator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the violator */,
  "mailing_address_str_number" INTEGER /* Street number of the mailing address of the violator */,
  "mailing_address_str_name" TEXT /* Street name of the mailing address of the violator */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the violator */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the violator */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* ZIP code of the violator */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the violator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the violator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the violator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_code" TEXT /* Code representing the violation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the violation */,
  "fines" REAL /* Default fine amount for the violation */,
  "admin_fees" REAL /* Default admin fee amount for the violation */,
  "state_fees" REAL /* Default state fee amount for the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency issuing the ticket */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inspector who issued the ticket */,
  "violator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the violator */,
  "violation_code" TEXT /* Code representing the type of violation */,
  "violation_street_number" INTEGER /* Street number of the violation location */,
  "violation_street_name" TEXT /* Street name of the violation location */,
  "violation_zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the violation location */,
  "mailing_address_str_number" INTEGER /* Street number of the violator's mailing address */,
  "mailing_address_str_name" TEXT /* Street name of the violator's mailing address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the violation */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the violation */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* ZIP code of the violator */,
  "non_us_str_code" TEXT /* Non-US street code if applicable */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the violator */,
  "ticket_issued_date" TEXT /* Date and time the ticket was issued */,
  "hearing_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the hearing related to the ticket */,
  "disposition" TEXT /* Disposition of the ticket (e.g., Responsible by Default) */,
  "fine_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fine imposed */,
  "admin_fee" REAL /* Administrative fee associated with the ticket */,
  "state_fee" REAL /* State fee associated with the ticket */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Late fee if applicable */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied */,
  "clean_up_cost" REAL /* Cost for cleanup related to the violation */,
  "judgment_amount" REAL /* Total judgment amount including all fees */,
  "grafitti_status" TEXT /* Status of graffiti related to the violation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ticket (e.g., Open, Closed, In-Progress) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_violator_id FOREIGN KEY ("violator_id") REFERENCES violators ("violator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_violation_code FOREIGN KEY ("violation_code") REFERENCES violations ("violation_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated ticket */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., fine, admin fee, state fee) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the fee payment (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hearings" (
  "hearing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hearing */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated ticket */,
  "hearing_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the hearing */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the hearing */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the hearing (e.g., Guilty, Not Guilty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hearing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hearings_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispositions" (
  "disposition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disposition entry */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated ticket */,
  "disposition" TEXT /* Disposition result of the ticket (e.g., Responsible by Default, Resolved) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the disposition was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disposition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dispositions_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated ticket */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Cash, Credit Card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount entry */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated ticket */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of the discount */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Expiry date for the discount */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., Early Payment, Senior Citizen) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cleanup_costs" (
  "cleanup_cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cleanup cost entry */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated ticket */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost incurred for cleanup due to the violation */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the cleanup cost payment (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cleanup_cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cleanup_costs_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grafitti_reports" (
  "grafitti_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graffiti report */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated ticket */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the graffiti (e.g., Reported, Cleared) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the graffiti */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the graffiti was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grafitti_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grafitti_reports_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appeals" (
  "appeal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appeal */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated ticket */,
  "appeal_date" TEXT /* Date the appeal was filed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the appeal */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision made on the appeal (e.g., Upheld, Overturned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appeal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appeals_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)
